fields.title: Delete old extensions and update install script
fields.description:
Clean up old extension folders and update deployment.

## Delete
- extensions/beads/
- extensions/editor-hub/
- extensions/exa/
- extensions/sandbox/
- extensions/skill-marker/
- extensions/task/

## Keep (but now has new structure)
- extensions/tau/

## Update scripts/pi/install-extensions.sh
- Remove: beads, exa, task, editor-hub, sandbox, skill-marker from EXTS array
- Keep only: tau

## Update AGENTS.md
- Remove references to separate extensions
- Update any paths

## DoD
- Only extensions/tau/ exists
- install-extensions.sh only installs tau
- No broken symlinks in ~/.pi/agent/extensions/
fields.close_reason: Removed legacy extensions/, updated installer to install only tau and clean up old symlinks; updated AGENTS.md packaging notes
